calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for the (Administrator) Jewish Family & Children's Services (JFCS).

Ms. Friedeberg reported that the estate has separate property over $1,000,000.00, that due to a defective will a large part of the separate property would be distributed to nieces & nephews instead of his wife, that they opened probate and successfully dealt with the nieces & nephews, that the will was admitted to court, that the entire estate would go to Mrs. Cook making is possible for her to stay where she is and that while they performed a lot of necessary work it benefitted Mrs. Cook and saved the estate $50,000.00. Ms. Friedeberg confirmed that JFCS is also the conservator, stated that an accounting in that case will be heard in June, that they only billed in both cases when necessary, that the bond had to be duplicated and that the transfer too time. The court requested that they address the relationship in regard to the two matters in the accounting. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg for Jewish Family and Children's Services (JFCS). Donna Adams from JFCS also present.

The Court stated that Proof of Publication had been filed but that it did not get scanned, and that everything appeared to be in order. The Petition for Letters of Administration was taken under submission for the Court to take a look at the publication.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Bui.
